recommendations.title: Last Looks
recommendations.overview: A disgraced ex-cop seeks solace by moving to the woods, but his quiet life comes to an end when a private eye recruits him to investigate the murder of an eccentric TV star's wife.

recommendations.title: Soul of Hero
recommendations.overview: A soldier will have a mission of rescuing his partner kidnapped in the Colombian jungle although he will miss a dating with a beautiful girl that is his partner's sister.

recommendations.title: Shaft
recommendations.overview: Cool Black private eye John Shaft is hired by a crime lord to find and retrieve his kidnapped daughter.

recommendations.title: The Yakuza
recommendations.overview: When George Tanner does business with high-ranking Yakuza Tono, Tono kidnaps his daughter, and George summons his old friend, private eye Harry Kilmer, to Japan to investigate.

recommendations.title: UFO
recommendations.overview: A college student, who sees a UFO, uses his exceptional math skills to investigate the sighting with his friends while the FBI follows closely behind.

recommendations.title: Case Closed: Zero the Enforcer
recommendations.overview: After a sudden explosion at Edge of Ocean island in Tokyo, Tōru Amuro, codename Zero, begins to investigate. Meanwhile, private eye Kogorō is arrested as a suspect, so Conan Edogawa conducts his own investigation to prove his innocence, but Amuro sta

recommendations.title: Blade II
recommendations.overview: Blade forms an uneasy alliance with the vampire council in order to combat the Reapers, who are feeding on vampires.

recommendations.title: The Dead Pool
recommendations.overview: Dirty Harry Callahan returns for his final film adventure. Together with his partner Al Quan, he must investigate the systematic murder of prominent figures. By the time Harry learns that the murders are part of a sick game to predict such deaths, it

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb: Star Wars
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction, Adventure, TV Movie, Action
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb become the galaxy's unlikeliest last hope when they must return the Death Star plans to the Rebel Alliance.

recommendations.title: Transformers Prime: Beast Hunters - Predacons Rising
recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Autobots, Decepticons, Predaking and Predacons form an unlikely alliance to battle a resurrected Unicron.
recommendations.director: Vinton Heuck, Scooter Tidwell, Todd Waterman
